title: Atskirų ūkio KPI / ekonominiai rodikliai, įskaitant sektorių rodiklius, skirtus lyginamajai analizei
description: A guide for monitoring and comparing farm-level KPIs and economic metrics to support decision-making in dairy farming. It presents a web-based management tool funded by the EU Horizon 2020 program that computes production costs, profitability thresholds, and technical indicators in real time through a visual dashboard.
